rationale: Verified the delta (git diff 19bc8114..e71a7991) is confined to internal/complete/panel_advisory.go + its test, and is a pure reorder: the panel_refuted_entries present-null check and decodeRefutations call were moved from after the len(pending)==0 early return to before it; the coverage-loop body (covered map build + pending walk + malformed-slot check) is byte-identical to round 2, just relocated below the (also unmoved) early return. uncoveredPendingObligations remains the single shared core: reconcilePendingRefutations (panel_advisory.go:694) and CheckPendingObligations (panel_advisory.go:627) both call it unchanged. Confirmed via `git diff --stat` that panel_advisory_test.go shows 0 deletions (purely additive: 4 new subtests), and panel_advisory.go's 8 deletions are exactly the reorder. Ran `go test -count=1 ./internal/complete ./internal/lifecycle ./internal/executor ./internal/doctor ./cmd/mindspec` — all green. Specifically ran the full TestPanelRefuted_* suite (10+ cases incl. table-driven subtests) verbosely: all PASS unchanged, confirming reconcile's coverage/settle behavior on valid pending+refuted inputs is untouched. gofmt -l and go vet on both files are clean. No existing test expectation was edited. No regression found.
